chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Constt: Petition.No.D-148 of 2020. _________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE ___________________________________________________ Before: Mr. Justice Irshad Ali Shah, Mr. Justice Shamsuddin Abbasi, 01. For orders on office objection “A”. 02. For orders on M.A.No.890/2014 (E/A) 03. For orders on M.A.No.1741/2020 (151 Cr.PC) 04. For maintability of main case. 23.11.2021 Mr. Inayatullah G. Morio, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Imtiaz Ali Jatoi, Advocate for respondent No.1 to 3. = * = * = * = * = * = At very outset, it is stated by learned counsel for the petitioner that after decision on his departmental appeal, the situation now has been changed, therefore, if the petitioner is permitted to file a fresh petition on changed situation, then he would not press the disposal of the instant constitutional petition before this Court on merits, which is not opposed by learned counsel for other side. Order accordingly. J U D G E J U D G E
